name: world-model-mcp
description: Enforcement, provenance, and harness-neutral memory for AI coding agents. Temporal knowledge graph with PreToolUse constraint enforcement and PostCompact context re-injection.
long_description: world-model-mcp builds a temporal knowledge graph for your codebase: entities, facts with valid_at/invalid_at timestamps, learned constraints from corrections, decision traces, and confidence-weighted contradiction resolution. v0.7.0 adds PostCompact and UserPromptSubmit auto-injection hooks that re-emit relevant constraints and recent facts after context loss, a defer enforcement tier that pauses headless agents on recurring warning-level violations, a compaction audit log so developers can see what was remembered across compaction boundaries, and a Cursor adapter package for harness-neutral deployment.
